## Skill Name
<!-- kebab-case, e.g., paper-methodology -->

## Plugin Category
<!-- academic | development | formatting | office | research-agents -->

<!-- What does this skill do? When would a researcher use it? -->

## Task Type
<!-- writing | verification | analysis | formatting | automation | dissemination | review -->

## Research Phase
<!-- literature-review | experiment-design | implementation | paper-writing | submission | rebuttal | dissemination -->

## Verification Level
<!-- formal | heuristic | layered | none -->
<!-- Can this skill verify its own output? How? -->

## Implementation Approach
<!-- Script-first | LLM-required | Hybrid -->
<!-- If script-first or hybrid, what tools/scripts would it use? -->

## Example Use Case
<!-- Concrete scenario where a researcher would invoke this skill -->
